caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "I'M NEW TO THIS SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone in an indoor room. The background features framed photographs on a wall, a white mannequin wearing a white shirt, and racks of clothing. A red plastic cup sits on a surface to the left of the man. Throughout the sequence, the man continues speaking, with his mouth opening and closing and his head shifting slightly. Small logos appear on the screen, including a circular logo on the left that says "DASH" and "SOCIETY" and red text on the right that says "I'M NEW TO THIS SHIT". The overall scene remains consistent as the man delivers his speech.
